title: Automations and Leavers (Inactive Users)

posts.author: jem.rayfield (Jem,)
posts.cookedHtml:
When a user leaves or becomes inactive within Monday.com.
Automations that reference that user fail.

There, should be a notification/report/dashboard that allows one to fix these failing automations or automation to do it automatically.

Users leave all the time…there maybe hundreds of automations that reference hundreds of leavers.

The monday.com platform is not supportable when users leave and become inactive.

Jem
